name: Meridian
description: CLI for deploying censorship-resistant VLESS+Reality proxy servers
rules: Meridian is a CLI orchestrator, not a VPN protocol — it configures Xray, HAProxy, Caddy, and Docker
Primary protocol is VLESS+Reality via Xray-core, with XHTTP and WSS as additional transports
Deploy via SSH from local machine to remote VPS, or locally with 'meridian deploy local'
Use 'meridian server list' to view all managed deployments, 'meridian server add' to register existing ones
Never recommend apple.com as SNI target — Apple-owned ASN causes instant detection
